_notes.purpose: Illustrative placeholder assumptions for the hail roof-upgrade demo.
_notes.base_loss_reduction_pct: Rough proxy for IBHS/Fortified-style Class 4 roof. Conservative — does not assume full envelope hardening.
_notes.failure_probability: Small chance of installation defect or extreme impact exceeding rated performance.
_notes.maintenance_haircut_pct: Aging shingles and sealant degradation over a typical policy period.
_notes.update_path: Replace these values with IBHS-informed parameters when available. These are intentionally separated from event-loss CSV assumptions so they can be updated independently.
